title: ConfigureHopperSpeed
description: This Mod adds configurable hopper speeds and amounts to you singelplayer worlds via /hopperspeed and /hopperamount
body:
# HopperMod 🪣

**Control hopper speed and item transfer amount with simple commands — no restart, no config file.**

---

## ✨ Features

- **`/hopperspeed <ticks>`** — How many ticks between each transfer (Vanilla = 8). Lower = faster. Set it to `1` for maximum speed!
- **`/hopperamount <items>`** — How many items are moved per transfer (Vanilla = 1). Set it to `64` for bulk item movement!
- Both commands work **without OP permissions** — perfect for Singleplayer
- Changes take effect **instantly**, no reload needed
- Compatible with **Lithium**, Sodium and other optimization mods

---

## 📋 Commands

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| `/hopperspeed` | Shows the current setting |
| `/hopperspeed <1–1200>` | Sets the ticks between transfers |
| `/hopperamount` | Shows the current setting |
| `/hopperamount <1–64>` | Sets the items per transfer |

---

## 💡 Examples

| Goal | Commands |
|---|---|
| Twice as fast as Vanilla | `/hopperspeed 4` |
| Maximum speed | `/hopperspeed 1` |
| 8 items at once | `/hopperamount 8` |
| Ultra-Hopper (Turbo mode) | `/hopperspeed 1` + `/hopperamount 64` |
| Reset to Vanilla | `/hopperspeed 8` + `/hopperamount 1` |

---

## ⚙️ Technical Details

- Settings apply **globally** to all hoppers in the world
- Settings **reset on restart** (Vanilla values as default)
- Singleplayer supported

---

## 📦 Requirements

- **Minecraft:** 1.21.4-1.21.11
- **Fabric Loader:** ≥ 0.17.0
- **Fabric API:** required
